name: intent-verification-gate
description: Reusable intent verification workflow for durable request, intent, plan, manifest, evidence, review, validation, blocker, index, and rerun artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Durable intent, plan, evidence, review, and rerun gate for Codex work.
interface.longDescription: Intent Verification Gate gives Codex a reusable artifact workflow for meaningful product, UX, architecture, workflow, and global-behavior changes. It includes helper commands for creating runs with submitted implementation plans, validating evidence and plan completion, generating review packets, recording blockers, indexing history, and rerunning past gate reviews without overwriting prior review rounds.
defaultPrompt: Rerun the past intent verification gate for this change
